name: THE CRAWLER
containment: SCP-7743 is held in a ██████-reinforced underground chamber. Motion sensors must remain active at all times. Entry requires two Level-3 personnel minimum. Do not feed SCP-7743 anything with a ████████ greater than 80kg.
description: Hexapedal predatory entity, approximately 1.8m in length and 0.6m in height. Six limbs terminate in ████████ appendages. Subject has shown clear signs of tactical intelligence and has twice breached containment. Maximum recorded speed: ██ km/h over short distances.
addendum: SCP-7743 appears to recognize and remember individual personnel. It has been observed ████████ containment seams in a deliberate pattern consistent with tool use. Reclassification to Keter is under review.
